title: ChatBotKit Report Schemas
description: Input and output schemas for all available reports

cm7k3m5n8k000008jq7h9e5b1a.name: Dataset Records Report
cm7k3m5n8k000008jq7h9e5b1a.description: Report on total number of records for a list of datasets

clr3m5n8k000008jq7h9e5b1a.name: Total Ratings Report
clr3m5n8k000008jq7h9e5b1a.description: Comprehensive report on total number of ratings received

clr3m5n8k000308jq1h7i8j4d.name: Total Contacts Report
clr3m5n8k000308jq1h7i8j4d.description: Report on total number of unique contacts/users

clr3m5n8k000408jq9i8j9k5e.name: Active Contacts Report
clr3m5n8k000408jq9i8j9k5e.description: Report on number of active contacts with conversations

clr3m5n8k000508jq2j9k0l6f.name: Total Conversations Report
clr3m5n8k000508jq2j9k0l6f.description: Report on total number of conversations handled

clr3m5n8k000608jq3k0l1m7g.name: Total Messages Report
clr3m5n8k000608jq3k0l1m7g.description: Report on total number of messages exchanged

clr3m5n8k000708jq4l1m2n8h.name: User Messages Report
clr3m5n8k000708jq4l1m2n8h.description: Report on number of user messages/requests processed

clr3m5n8k000808jq5m2n3o9i.name: Bot Messages Report
clr3m5n8k000808jq5m2n3o9i.description: Report on number of bot/agent responses delivered

clr3m5n8k000908jq6n3o4p0j.name: Activity Messages Report
clr3m5n8k000908jq6n3o4p0j.description: Report on number of agent actions taken

clr3m5n8k000a08jq7o4p5q1k.name: Average User Messages per Conversation Report
clr3m5n8k000a08jq7o4p5q1k.description: Report on average number of user messages per conversation

clr3m5n8k000b08jq8p5q6r2l.name: Average Bot Messages per Conversation Report
clr3m5n8k000b08jq8p5q6r2l.description: Report on average number of bot responses per conversation

clr3m5n8k000c08jq9q6r7s3m.name: Average Actions per Conversation Report
clr3m5n8k000c08jq9q6r7s3m.description: Report on average number of actions per conversation

clr3m5n8k000d08jqar7s8t4n.name: Comprehensive Overview Report
clr3m5n8k000d08jqar7s8t4n.description: Complete analytics overview with ratings, contacts, conversations, and messages including detailed breakdowns and lists

clr3m5n8k000e08jqbs0t1u5o.name: Bot Stats Report
clr3m5n8k000e08jqbs0t1u5o.description: Statistics for a specific bot including conversations, messages, token consumption, ratings, and sentiment signal

botId.description: The ID of the bot to get stats for

sentimentSignal.description: Overall sentiment based on ratings: positive if more thumbs up, negative if more thumbs down, neutral if equal, unknown if no ratings

clr3m5n8k000f08jqcs1u2v6p.name: Alerts Report
clr3m5n8k000f08jqcs1u2v6p.description: Compiles a list of alerts for the current user including usage warnings, limit warnings, and sentiment alerts

severity.description: Alert severity: info for 20%+ spike, warning for 50%+ spike, critical for 100%+ spike

baseline.description: Reference value for comparison: average for spikes, limit for database alerts, or total for ratios

percentage.description: Percentage change or ratio from the baseline

clr3m5n8k000g08jqdt1u2v7q.name: Bot Performance Report
clr3m5n8k000g08jqdt1u2v7q.description: Per-bot performance metrics with period-over-period trends and daily breakdowns for conversations, messages, tokens, and ratings

botId.description: The ID of the bot to get performance for

clr3m5n8k000h08jqeu2v3w8r.name: Bot Conversation Quality Report
clr3m5n8k000h08jqeu2v3w8r.description: Per-bot conversation quality metrics including depth distribution, abandonment rate, token efficiency, and top actions used

botId.description: The ID of the bot to get quality metrics for

long.description: Conversations with more than 10 user messages

clr3m5n8k000i08jqfv3w4x9s.name: Bot Alerts Report
clr3m5n8k000i08jqfv3w4x9s.description: Per-bot alerts detecting negative feedback surges, token spikes, conversation drops, and abandonment increases

botId.description: The ID of the bot to check alerts for

clr3m5n8k000j08jqgw4x5y0t.name: Bot Negative Feedback Report
clr3m5n8k000j08jqgw4x5y0t.description: Recent negative ratings for a specific bot with user reasons and linked conversations for drill-down

botId.description: The ID of the bot to get feedback for

limit.description: Maximum number of negative ratings to return

gpv2an25fuhe2k6v6ckv85v8.name: Comprehensive Analytics Report
gpv2an25fuhe2k6v6ckv85v8.description: Complete analytics overview with ratings, contacts, conversations, messages, and token usage including detailed breakdowns and lists

pov1s2k3l4m5n6o7p8q9r0sov.name: Platform Overview Report
pov1s2k3l4m5n6o7p8q9r0sov.description: Single-call dashboard payload for the platform overview screen with resource counts, usage time series, top bots, and recent work
